hero.headline: Your Neighborhood Pool Team Since 2010
hero.subheadline: Richardson families trust Aqua Pool Care for honest, owner-operated service you can count on. No corporate runaround — just Brian and his crew keeping your pool pristine all year long.
checkmarks: Direct access to the owner on every job
Photo updates so you always know the status
Trusted by HOAs, realtors & homeowners alike

services.headline: Everything Your Pool Needs, Under One Roof
services.subtitle: From weekly skimming to full replastering, Aqua Pool Care handles it all so you never have to juggle multiple contractors.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Service
cards.description: Consistent weekly cleaning and chemical balancing that keeps your water crystal clear and swim-ready every single day.

cards.title: Pool Equipment Repair
cards.description: Fast diagnosis and repair of pumps, filters, heaters, and more — so small problems never become expensive emergencies.

cards.title: Pool Replastering & Resurfacing
cards.description: Restore your pool's interior finish with expert replastering that adds years of life and a fresh, beautiful look.

cards.title: DE Filter Cleaning
cards.description: Thorough diatomaceous earth filter maintenance that ensures optimal water clarity and healthy circulation.

cards.title: Algae Treatment & Recovery
cards.description: Green pool? We'll bring it back to sparkling blue with professional-grade treatment and ongoing prevention plans.

cards.title: Seasonal Maintenance
cards.description: Complete opening and closing services including winterization and spring startup to protect your pool investment year-round.

steps.title: Call or Text Brian
steps.description: Reach the owner directly — no phone trees, no waiting. Describe your pool situation and we'll schedule a visit that fits your week.

steps.title: Get a Straight-Up Assessment
steps.description: Brian or a crew member inspects your pool on-site, explains exactly what's needed, and gives you an honest, no-pressure quote.

steps.title: Enjoy a Worry-Free Pool
steps.description: We handle the cleaning, chemistry, and repairs with photo updates along the way. You just enjoy the water.

about.label: About Aqua Pool Care
about.headline: A Real Neighbor Taking Care of Real Pools
about.description: Since 2010, owner Brian McDonald and his team of 9 have been the go-to pool care provider for Richardson and surrounding North Texas communities. We started because we believed pool owners deserved better than impersonal big-brand service. Today, we work with homeowners, HOAs, management companies, and realtors who value responsive communication, honest pricing, and workmanship they can see with their own eyes. When you call Aqua Pool Care, you talk to people who care about your pool as much as you do.

features.title: Owner on Every Job
features.description: Direct access to Brian — no middlemen, no runaround. You always know who's taking care of your pool.

features.title: Photo Updates Every Visit
features.description: We send real-time photos via text so you can see exactly what was done, even when you're not home.

features.title: Full-Service Capability
features.description: From weekly cleaning to major replastering projects, one trusted team handles everything your pool needs.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing, No Surprises
pricing.subtitle: Every pool is different. Contact us for a free, no-obligation estimate tailored to your pool's size, condition, and needs.

guarantee.headline: Our Straight-Talk Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're not satisfied with any service visit, call Brian directly and we'll come back to make it right — no extra charge, no excuses. We've built our reputation on doing honest work for 16 years, and we stand behind every job.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start weekly pool service?
faqs.answer: Most new weekly service accounts start within 3-5 business days of your initial call. We'll do an on-site assessment first to understand your pool's needs and recommend the right service plan.

faqs.question: Do you work with HOAs and property management companies?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We work with homeowner associations, management companies, and realtors throughout North Texas. We understand the reporting and scheduling requirements that come with commercial accounts.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Richardson, Allen, Melissa, Plano, McKinney, and surrounding North Texas communities. If you're not sure whether you're in our service area, just give us a call and we'll let you know.

faqs.question: Can you fix my green pool?
faqs.answer: Yes — green pool recovery is one of our specialties. We use professional-grade chemical treatments and filtration techniques to restore even badly neglected pools back to clear, safe swimming condition.

faqs.question: Will I get updates on the work being done?
faqs.answer: Always. We send photo updates via text so you can see exactly what was done during each visit. And if you ever have questions, you can reach Brian directly — no call centers or voicemail chains.

testimonials.name: Richard K.
testimonials.text: Quick to return my call and set up a time to come out to give an estimate. The bid was quick and reasonable. They maintained constant contact about progress, including text message photos and a phone call upon completion.

testimonials.name: Satisfied Customer
testimonials.text: Prompt, friendly, honest, quality, beautiful professional work. The job came out beautiful and they assisted with the liner choices. I would highly recommend them to anyone for pool care and services.

testimonials.name: North Texas Homeowner
testimonials.text: Brian and his crew have been maintaining our pool for several years now. They're always on time, communicative, and our pool has never looked better. It's great working with a local team that actually cares.

contact.headline: Let's Get Your Pool in Shape
contact.subtitle: Whether you need weekly maintenance, a one-time repair, or a full replaster, we'd love to hear from you. Reach out today for a free estimate.
benefits: Response within 24 hours — usually same day
Talk to the owner, not a call center

footer.description: Aqua Pool Care Inc has provided dependable pool cleaning, maintenance, and repair services to Richardson and North Texas families since 2010. Owner-operated, licensed, and insured.
